*p79591a0632* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 6          3.              y x 3x figure 1   figure 1 shows an open topped container used for holding water.   the container is in the shape of a cuboid and is made of sheet metal.   the base of the container is a rectangle 3x metres by x metres.   the height of the container is y metres as shown in figure 1.   given that the capacity of the container is 120 m 3   (a)  show that the area a m 2 of the sheet metal used to make the container is given by a px q x     2     where p and q are positive constants to be found. (4)   (b)  use calculus to find the value of x for which a has a stationary value, giving your  answer to 3 significant figures. (4)   (c)  find d d 2 2 a x  and hence show that the value of x found in part (b) gives the minimum  value of a. (2)
